name: Braised Chicken Legs w/ Creamy Sautéed Sweet Peppers
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Baby Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper both sides of the chicken legs.
2. Place the chicken in a shallow roasting pan and fill halfway with chicken stock.
3. Cover with aluminum foil to form a seal and roast at 350°F until done.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the sliced peppers in oil.
5. Add garlic, lime juice, cilantro, and Crema Mexicana to the peppers.
6. When the chicken is ready, transfer it to a serving platter.
7. Top with cheese to melt.
8. Pour the creamy pepper sauce over the chicken.
